fields.name: Physically Inferior
fields.description: -1d when resisting physical harm.

fields.name: Bizarre Blindspot
fields.description: -1d when resisting Stand, Hamon, or supernatural effects.

fields.name: Slower Recovery
fields.description: Healing clock permanently reduced by 1 segment.

fields.name: Slower Movement
fields.description: Base movement speed reduced from 30ft to 20ft.

fields.name: Sinks Like a Rock
fields.description: Cannot swim, cannot float.

fields.name: Slow Regeneration
fields.description: Healing clock has +1 additional segment.

fields.name: Hunted by Rock Humans
fields.description: Other Rock Humans can sense your location within 100ft.

fields.name: Slow Reflexes
fields.description: -1d when resisting physical attacks.

fields.name: Vulnerable to High Frequency Vibrations
fields.description: Sound-based attacks deal +1 Harm.

fields.name: Cold-Brittle
fields.description: Freezing temperatures cause you to move at half speed.

fields.name: Sunlight Weakness
fields.description: Takes Level 4 Harm per minute in direct sunlight.

fields.name: Hamon Vulnerability
fields.description: Hamon techniques deal +1 Harm and bypass armor.

fields.name: Must Be Invited Inside
fields.description: Cannot enter homes without an invitation.

fields.name: Loses Max Stress Without Feeding
fields.description: Every day without feeding, max stress decreases by 1 (restored after feeding).

fields.name: Holy Symbol Weakness
fields.description: Seeing a cross deals Level 2 Harm. You must make a fortune roll to fulfill a 4 tick clock.

fields.name: Silver Allergy
fields.description: Weapons made of silver ignore armor and resistances.

fields.name: Sunlight Turns You to Stone
fields.description: Direct exposure to sunlight petrifies you indefinitely.

fields.name: Hamon Weakness
fields.description: Hamon techniques deal +1 Harm and bypass armor.

fields.name: Cold Weakness
fields.description: Freezing temperatures slow movement and reaction time.

fields.name: Weak to Blood Loss
fields.description: Cannot regenerate while suffering beyond level 2 harm.

fields.name: Requires Constant Adaptation
fields.description: Must spend 1 downtime action per session in training.

fields.name: Hunted by Zeppeli Bloodline
fields.description: Hamon users worldwide seek to exterminate you.

fields.name: Weak to Electricity
fields.description: Electrical attacks are potent towards you and disable any racial transformations for the duration of the exchange.

fields.name: Alien Understanding
fields.description: -1d on social interactions unless disguised as a human.

fields.name: Sensitive to Soundwaves
fields.description: Loud noises cause pain and disorientation.

fields.name: Cannot Speak English
fields.description: Must communicate via symbols or mimicry.

fields.name: Cannot Heal Normally
fields.description: Requires specific alien tech to recover.

fields.name: Heat Sensitivity
fields.description: High temperatures disrupt shape-shifting abilities.

fields.name: Hamon Disrupts Your Form
fields.description: Hamon techniques deal +1 Harm and temporarily disable phasing.

fields.name: Unstable Physiology
fields.description: When you max out your stress capacity, roll a d6 — on a 1-3, gain an extra trauma.

fields.name: Cannot Heal Normally
fields.description: Requires spiritual rituals to recover.

fields.name: Disrupts Electronics
fields.description: Presence causes tech failures.

fields.name: Cold Weakness
fields.description: Low temperatures slow movement.

fields.name: Unfinished Business
fields.description: Something compels you to act against your will.

fields.name: Frost Vulnerability
fields.description: Frost related attacks deal +1 Harm and disable prosthetics/implants for 1 scene.

fields.name: Limited Repairs
fields.description: Healing requires a technician or mechanical parts instead of normal recovery.

fields.name: Heavy Frame
fields.description: Movement speed reduced by 10ft.

fields.name: Maintenance Required
fields.description: If you do not repair yourself once per session, you suffer -1d to all physical actions.

fields.name: Loss of Touch
fields.description: No sense of pain or temperature.

fields.name: Cybernetic Overload
fields.description: If you overuse cybernetics in one scene, take automatic Level 2 Harm ("System Overheat").

fields.name: Visions Are Uncontrollable
fields.description: Occasionally, you receive flashes of prophecy, forcing a Resolve roll to stay focused.

fields.name: Cursed Fate
fields.description: If you take Trauma, the GM can force a new long-term consequence related to your fate.

fields.name: Blind Faith
fields.description: Your adherence to faith or the course of history has left you blind.

fields.name: Tragedy
fields.description: At the beginning of each session, roll 1 dice. The GM can assign this dice roll to any roll (fortune, resistance, action).
